title: Faithful: PAEHSVAdjust param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 7.3 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEHSVAdjust must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEHSVAdjust to range extremes across hosts ['Objects__Leaves', 'Stylized__Center', 'Stylized__Light_Sweep', 'Stylized__Lower'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=7.27 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEHSVAdjust implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEHSVAdjust` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "value", "theta": -1.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 110.43, "ddb": 7.269}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "value", "theta": 2.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 47.398, "ddb": 10.272}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "value", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 65.985, "ddb": 10.36}, {"host": "Stylized__Lower", "param": "value", "theta": 2.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 68.15, "ddb": 11.332}, {"host": "Stylized__Center", "param": "value", "theta": 2.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 67.683, "ddb": 11.521}, {"host": "Stylized__Light_Sweep", "param": "saturation", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 46.027, "ddb": 11.596}]
